title: Glitzy Gold Birthday Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 213cm) 1 Piece - Elegant Party Tablecloth for Festive Celebrations
features: GLITZY GOLD BIRTHDAY TABLE COVER: Add a touch of elegance and sparkle to your next birthday celebration with this stunning glitzy gold birthday rectangular plastic table cover. Perfect for creating a luxurious and memorable party atmosphere.

HIGH-QUALITY PLASTIC MATERIAL: Crafted from durable plastic, this rectangular table cover not only looks fantastic, but is also easily wipeable, water-resistant, and reusable, making it a practical and cost-effective choice for your festive events.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Measuring 137cm x 213cm, this large tablecloth easily fits most rectangular tables, providing ample coverage and protection during your birthday or festive celebrations, ensuring a hassle-free cleanup experience.
ONE-PIECE CONVENIENCE: Each pack contains 1 piece of our glitzy gold birthday table cover, allowing you to effortlessly create a beautifully coordinated and glamorous party setting.

ELEGANT PARTY ACCESSORY: Ideal for various festive celebrations, this eye-catching tablecloth is perfect for your lavish birthday feasts, holiday soirees, or glamorous New Year's Eve parties, instantly elevating your event's visual appeal and atmosphere.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Pumpkin Orange Sunflower Yellow Lime Green Ruby Red Glitzy Gold Birthday Add-On Items These stunning designs are sure to WOW your guests when celebrating your Birthday! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! If Glitzy Gold isn't your taste, check out our other beautiful Birthday options. Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights!
